title: Project: Edgerunner - Cyberpunk
description: Project: Edgerunner adds a full cyberpunk-inspired cyberware augmentation system. Install implants via a Ripperdoc to boost your stats, but push too far and risk Cyberpsychosis
body:
![ripperdoc-image.png ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/989a3cf956b32f01f3ae6ef6e20a621a3ce07a30.png)

_Install chrome, break the flow of combat, and survive the cost._

**Project: Edgerunner** is a Minecraft Palladium addon inspired by **Cyberpunk 2077** and **Cyberpunk: Edgerunners**, mixing faithful mechanics with original design choices. Install and manage cyberware through the **RipperDoc**, assemble advanced components at the **Tailoring Bench**, customize implants at the **Cyberware Painting Station**, and build a combat identity around speed control, brutal melee pressure, tactical scanning, and survival under constant stress.

Chrome has consequences. Every implant adds **Load**, and if your body can no longer reconcile the amount of installed cyberware, you begin descending into **Cyberpsychosis**.

### **Full in-game guide**
with everything you need to know about cyberware, crafting, upgrades, and surviving Cyberpsychosis.

![This mod is still in development and currently in a beta state, so everything is subject to change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28bc71a5cb14e96dfc4d0c6ee21fd436b50f6642.png)

## Interfaces

![all-gui's-v1.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffeb45a0fe2c6e685b75048357d85b5b6c5a7f00.png)

## Cyberware

### OS Slot

*   **Sandevistan Warp Dancer**: Applies 20% slowdown and stands out for elemental resistances while active.
*   **Zetatech Sandevistan**: Applies 30% slowdown with a short cooldown and strong bonus damage, especially against airborne targets.
*   **Dynalar Sandevistan**: Applies 50% slowdown with a longer active window and reliable damage scaling.
*   **Sandevistan Falcon**: Applies 70% slowdown, lasts long, and rewards neutralizes with bonus max health.
*   **Sandevistan Apogee**: Applies 85% slowdown, highest damage boost, and kill-based duration extension.

![sandevistan-model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67670cc53ed6ad2fe0a291ad4f2d9e112a19b995.gif)

### Frontal Cortex Slot

*   **Axolotl**: Every kill cuts all cyberware cooldowns and can help refill Sandevistan charge.

![axolotl-item.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88dd96a9be2fae3eaabbb2e7a6092191d41cde78.png)

### Face Slot

*   **Basic Kiroshi Optics**: Adds visor health readouts and 2x-6x optical zoom.
*   **Clairvoyant**: Scans and highlights hostile targets through cover with night vision.
*   **Doomsayer**: Exposes traps and environmental hazards like TNT, pistons, and sculk.
*   **Stalker**: Tracks nearby players and mobs with visible trails through cover.
*   **The Oracle**: Merges enemy scan, hazard scan, trail tracking, night vision, and max zoom.

(Face cyberware visuals are fully customizable to all skins in the config)

![implantes_ocular.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc4a30dc71777d162e4486312d0d0d9bf82fa8e.png)

### Arms Slot

*   **Gorilla Arms**: Deploys brute-force arms for stronger melee, elemental damage, bleed, grabs, throws, slams, and finishers. Also with **Electric**, **Thermal**, **Toxic** and **Freezing** upgrades.

![gorilla-arms-models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/519c804966ae4c302ba126f77fdc96268bfdac41.gif)

### Skeleton Slot

Passive implants crafted at the **Tailoring Bench** and installed through the **Ripper Doc**. Each has a Palladium upgrade tree.

**Combat frames**

*   **Titanium Bones**: Physical and elemental resistance, knockback stability, heavier falls, and Gorilla Slam synergy.
*   **Dense Marrow**: Melee damage, Gorilla Fury generation, and Slam pressure.
*   **Scarab**: Crouch-brace defense with a counterattack window after unbracing.
*   **Rara Avis**: Iconic heavy armor — high resistances, movement penalty, and low-health **Redline**.

**Mobility frames**

*   **Bionic Joints**: Movement speed, fall reduction, and knockback control.
*   **Hollow Bones**: Ultralight speed and jump height; conflicts with Titanium Bones, Dense Marrow, and Rara Avis.
*   **Kinetic Frame**: Chance-based mitigation while moving; Sandevistan active counts as high movement.
*   **Spring Joints**: Softens strong hits and falls; rebound jumps and post-Slam recovery.

**Defense frames**

*   **Scar Coalescer**: Low-health physical resistance, bleed control, and survival aggression.
*   **Para Bellum**: Broad physical, projectile, explosion, and elemental reduction.
*   **Universal Booster**: Important heals grant stacking temporary resistances; synergizes with Blood Pump.
*   **Epimorphic Skeleton**: Max health, healing received, extra Max Load, and defensive pressure relief.

![skeleton-slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/430a932ac3f1decf4d4996d0473ec71ad5bc7f92.png)

### Legs Slot

*   **Fortified Ankles**: Charges a powered launch jump when you crouch before takeoff.
*   **Reinforced Tendons**: Lets you perform a second jump in mid-air on demand.

![legs-slot-items.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93bc40c0b8e45c6a415101a67ab7828532395926.png)

### Circulatory Slot

*   **Blood Pump**: Spends a charge for instant healing plus regeneration, then recharges over time.

![bloodpump-model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17023192e3264b699ff0eaf60396a720165f0ed3.gif)

## Cyberpsychosis

*   **What it is**: The cost of too much chrome, driven by short-term **Pressure** and long-term **Degradation**.
*   **Pressure**: Spikes while active cyberware is running and falls while you rest.
*   **Degradation**: Builds when Pressure stays high and drops slowly when you keep it low.

### Phases

*   **Phase I — Prodrome**: Minor glitches and warning signs, still easy to reverse.
*   **Phase II — Deterioration**: Hallucinations, debuffs, and implant misfires begin.
*   **Phase III — Acute**: Motor instability starts and allies may read as hostile.
*   **Phase IV — Crisis**: Symptoms become constant and the whole system starts breaking down.
*   **Phase V — Terminal**: A death countdown begins, with berserk episodes and full-loss control risk.

Requirements:

[Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium/version/4.4.0+1.20.1-forge) | [Kubejs](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) | [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) | [Modonomicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/modonomicon) | [Gravestone: Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-core) | [Lodestone](https://modrinth.com/mod/lodestonelib)
